channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road Safety Barriers need to be collected., 3rd April
item.description:
Following work on the pavement immediately outside my house (62 Pickhurst Park). The safety barriers have now to be collected. Today, I found them on their side on the road, which is a hazard for pedestrians and traffic. I have moved the three barriers to the side of the opposite pathway next to an oak tree. Please can you arrange for them to be collected before an accident happens. Thankyou.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The two green/grey semi-circle cycle storage containers have been extensively spray tagged in solver or white paint, on the pedestrian section of Hardings Lane, at the jct with Lennard Rd Penge, 3rd April
item.description:
The two green/grey semi-circle cycle storage containers have been extensively spray tagged in solver or white paint, on the pedestrian section of Hardings Lane, at the jct with Lennard Rd Penge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the public footway fronting 46, Lennard Rd Penge, between two parked cars, is a flattened cardboard box about 1m x 0.75m., 3rd April
item.description:
On the public footway fronting 46, Lennard Rd Penge, between two parked cars, is a flattened cardboard box about 1m x 0.75m. It has a building materials company name on it but no visible address. It has been there at least 3 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In Maitland Rd, near the corner with Lennard Rd, Penge, there is grafitti tagging on both green telecomms cabinets and a 'grafitti sticker' on the street name plate., 3rd April
item.description:
In Maitland Rd, near the corner with Lennard Rd, Penge, there is grafitti tagging on both green telecomms cabinets and a 'grafitti sticker' on the street name plate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rope snapped and screw came out, 3rd April
item.description:
The rope that my child used to swing on the 01.04.26 between 16:30pm to 17:10 pm snapped and the long screw on the right of the rope snapped. My child fell on his head and did had a bump. He was distressed and frightened over the shock of the fall. He did not feel well after. I think that was a proper safety breach as it is a children park and the schools just broke through for holidays: it is obvious that the park will be busy. Therefore, all these play equipment must have been checked. I would encourage to view the CCTV camera. It was a little boy of six years old and a lady. The little boy was the victim. I would like to put through a complaint for the lack of safety within the playground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heron Hill, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees blocking sunlight For multiple residents, 3rd April
item.description:
Overgrown trees blocking sunlight For multiple residents . Residents have complained several times but no action taken. These are the trees beside St Peter and St Paul catholic primary school and Beddingron Road in St Paul’s cray. Needs urgent attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement lifting, 3rd April
item.description:
Pavement has raised above kerb level. When opening car door, door gets caught/hits pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 Lordship Lane Flytipping, 3rd April
item.description:
A washing machine is on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Lordship Lane outside Marks and Spencer-Flytipping, 3rd April
item.description:

item.title: Fly tipped box, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, Someone has fly tipped a box of building materials at the end of Eastney street, please could these be cleared? Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastney Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip at the end of Eastney street, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, Someone has fly tipped some building materials at the end of Eastney street, please could these be cleared? Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three bins constantly on pavement causing fly tipping & mess daily, 3rd April
item.description:
Myself & other residents were told these bins were to be removed from the pavement months ago as they are here without permission. They cause fly tipping & general rubbish dumping daily . Foxes rip bags and food nappies & other debris is often strewn across the pavement and road causing obstruction and foul odours . Every time I note this you clear away the rubbish and the root of the issue remains to create ongoing dumping ! You close the account as sorted but it isn't . Please do as you said months ago and tell the pizza restaurant owner there bins are not to be there 24/7 . It would be bad enough if they put them out on the collection day but they've been permanently there for months despite numerous complaints. Please help !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing communal bin with broken bottom, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, there’s a big communal general waste bin that’s overflowing with a hole in the bottom, been left in the middle of the road at the entrance to Park Close. It’s come from the bin shed of Regency Court I believe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 13, 3rd April
item.description:
Children's tricycle Thank you for removing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
